scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.join('node_modules','uplot','dist'); const dest='vendor'; if (!fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.mkdirSync(dest); try { fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,'uPlot.iife.min.js'), path.join(dest,'uplot.min.js')); fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,'uPlot.min.css'), path.join(dest,'uplot.min.css')); } catch (e) { console.warn('uPlot copy skipped:', e.message); }"
